quote: "To succeed in life, you need three things: a wishbone, a backbone, and a funny bone."
name: Pearce Barnes
about: I am a Junior studying Biology and Business, and I currently serve as the President of DDS. Outside of Dentistry, I work for the DTH and am a member of the UNC Men's Club Volleyball team!

about: I am a Junior studying Neuroscience, and I currently serve as the Student Ambassador for DDS. Outside of Pre-dental, I am a competitive bodybuilder, so you can usually find me in the gym!

name: Bree Harris

about: As a senior who has navigated completing my pre-reqs, preparing for the DAT, and submitting my dental school applications, DDS has played an essential role in guiding me through unique opportunities. The community within this organization has helped me find some of my best friends while giving me the opportunity to gain countless experiences that have shaped my journey toward dentistry. Whether you're just starting your journey or getting ready to apply, I'm always here to help or chat!
bio: Hi! I'm a Senior studying Medical Anthropology with a Chemistry minor. I currently serve as Vice President and am so excited to see everyone this year and help with the rush process!
quote: "Life moves pretty fast. If you don't stop and look around once in a while, you could miss it."
name: Leila Tellez
interests: General Dentistry, HPSP military scholarship, Orthodontics
hobbies: Crocheting, going to the beach, reading, traveling, baking

name: Yunah Kim
quote: “Why waste time proving over and over how great you are, when you could be getting better?“
bio: Hi everyone, I am a sophomore majoring in biology with a minor in music. I am originally from Connecticut and am passionate about being a great resource and helping hand in the school and greater community. Serving as your Social Media Manager, I hope I can build a personal connection with each of you, and am excited to see how we all can positively grow this school year!
about: Hi, I’m Yunah! I am super friendly and love to meet new people! I absolutely love songwriting, sewing, working out, and going to concerts. Going forward, I hope to join the field of dentistry or biopharmaceuticals. I’ve been a member of DDS since my freshman year, and hope to stay involved and active :)

name: Zackaury Phan
about: Very extroverted and love a good time. I hate being alone so quality time is a big thing for me, I love to hang out and do fun activities. You can always find me at Rams Head gym playing open volleyball at night!
bio: Sophomore studying Biology and Medical Anthropology. I currently serve as the Social Chair of DDS. Outside of DDS, I am a member of the UNC Men's Club Volleyball team!

about: I'm a junior studying Biology with a minor in Entrepreneurship. I'm currently serving as the Service Coordinator for DDS. Outside of DDS, I like doing research, nails, painting, and hiking!

quote: Whatever you are, be a good one
